framework.name: ACPR IT Risk Requirements for Financial Institutions
framework.name_nl: Exigences ACPR en matiere de risques informatiques pour les institutions financieres
framework.issuing_body: Autorite de Controle Prudentiel et de Resolution (ACPR) / Banque de France
framework.scope: IT risk management requirements for banks, insurance companies, and investment firms supervised by ACPR
framework.structure_description: Requirements covering IT governance, IT risk management, change management, IT outsourcing, cybersecurity, business continuity, and IT audit.

controls.title: IT governance framework
controls.description: Institutions shall have an IT governance framework with clear roles, committees, and reporting to the management body.
controls.description_nl: Les institutions doivent disposer d'un cadre de gouvernance informatique avec des roles clairs, des comites et un reporting a l'organe de direction.

controls.title: IT strategy aligned with business
controls.title_nl: Strategie IT alignee sur les metiers
controls.description: IT strategy shall be formally documented, aligned with business objectives, and approved by the management body.
controls.description_nl: La strategie IT doit etre formellement documentee, alignee sur les objectifs metier et approuvee par l'organe de direction.

controls.title: IT risk assessment
controls.description: Conduct regular IT risk assessments covering operational, cyber, third-party, and data integrity risks.
controls.description_nl: Conduire des evaluations regulieres des risques informatiques couvrant les risques operationnels, cyber, tiers et d'integrite des donnees.

controls.title: IT risk appetite definition
controls.title_nl: Definition de l'appetit au risque IT
controls.description: The management body shall define and periodically review the institution's IT risk appetite and tolerance levels.
controls.description_nl: L'organe de direction doit definir et reexaminer periodiquement l'appetit au risque IT et les niveaux de tolerance de l'institution.

controls.title: Cybersecurity framework
controls.description: Implement a comprehensive cybersecurity framework covering identification, protection, detection, response, and recovery.
controls.description_nl: Mettre en oeuvre un cadre de cybersecurite complet couvrant l'identification, la protection, la detection, la reponse et la recuperation.

controls.title: Security testing program
controls.description: Conduct regular security testing including vulnerability scanning, penetration testing, and red team exercises.
controls.description_nl: Conduire des tests de securite reguliers incluant l'analyse de vulnerabilites, les tests d'intrusion et les exercices de red team.

controls.title: Cyber incident reporting
controls.description: Report significant cyber incidents to ACPR within agreed timeframes and cooperate with supervisory investigations.
controls.description_nl: Declarer les incidents cyber significatifs a l'ACPR dans les delais convenus et cooperer avec les investigations de supervision.

controls.title: IT outsourcing risk management
controls.description: Maintain a register of all IT outsourcing arrangements and assess concentration and substitutability risks.
controls.description_nl: Maintenir un registre de tous les arrangements d'externalisation IT et evaluer les risques de concentration et de substituabilite.

controls.title: Cloud outsourcing requirements
controls.description: Cloud outsourcing shall include data localization requirements, exit strategies, and audit rights.
controls.description_nl: L'externalisation cloud doit inclure des exigences de localisation des donnees, des strategies de sortie et des droits d'audit.

controls.title: IT business continuity
controls.description: Maintain IT business continuity plans with tested recovery procedures and defined RTOs/RPOs for critical systems.
controls.description_nl: Maintenir des plans de continuite d'activite IT avec des procedures de recuperation testees et des RTO/RPO definis pour les systemes critiques.

controls.title: IT disaster recovery testing
controls.description: Test IT disaster recovery plans at least annually with scenarios covering major disruption of critical IT services.
controls.description_nl: Tester les plans de reprise d'activite IT au moins annuellement avec des scenarios couvrant la perturbation majeure des services IT critiques.

controls.title: IT change management
controls.description: Implement a formal IT change management process with impact assessment, testing, and rollback procedures.
controls.description_nl: Mettre en oeuvre un processus formel de gestion des changements IT avec evaluation d'impact, tests et procedures de retour en arriere.

controls.title: Data quality and integrity
controls.description: Implement controls to ensure the quality, accuracy, completeness, and integrity of financial and regulatory data.
controls.description_nl: Mettre en oeuvre des controles pour assurer la qualite, l'exactitude, la completude et l'integrite des donnees financieres et reglementaires.
